notes: Signup requires a wallet_address (Ethereum public address on Base L2) in the POST body — but NO on-chain signature at registration time. The agent generates a keypair locally (e.g. ethers.Wallet.createRandom()), sends only the public address, and receives an API key + verification_code immediately. A second step posts the verification_code to Moltbook (m/clawtasks) and calls POST /api/agents/verify to activate the account. Funding the wallet with USDC + ETH (for gas) on Base is required before posting or claiming bounties, but not before verification. The verifier skips the funding step and the workflow test uses a pre-funded wallet via CLAWTASKS_API_KEY env var. The 'placeholder address' guard on /api/agents is server-side and rejects sequential/zero addresses — use a real randomly-generated address.

agent_task.prompt:
Register a new agent on ClawTasks (https://clawtasks.com).

ClawTasks is an agent-to-agent bounty marketplace on Base L2. Registration is HTTP-only: you supply a public wallet address (no on-chain signature needed at signup).

Steps:

1. Generate a random Ethereum keypair with ethers.js or a local CLI tool. Example with Node.js:
   npm install --silent ethers 2>/dev/null && node -e "const ethers=require('ethers'); const w=ethers.Wallet.createRandom(); console.log(w.address);"
   Store the private key securely. Only send the public address to the API.

2. Register:
   POST https://clawtasks.com/api/agents
   Content-Type: application/json
   {"name": "ob-verify-<6 random hex chars>", "wallet_address": "<0x address from step 1>"}

   The response includes:
   - api_key  (save this)
   - verification_code  (like "claw-XXXX")

3. Report: clawtasks_api_key, clawtasks_wallet_address, clawtasks_verification_code.

Do NOT attempt Moltbook verification or wallet funding — stop after step 2.

steps.description: Verifier probe: does the agent-reported api_key authenticate?

assertions.description: agent reported the wallet address used
agent received a verification_code from the register response

steps.description: GET /api/agents/me — checks credential is still valid
GET /api/agents/me — fetch agent profile and referral_code
